message:
feat(e2e): add stdout capture, replay scripts, session transcript integration, and richer artifact tracking

subprocess: ConnectorProcessRunner now captures stdout alongside stderr.
Add command_metadata(), replay_shell_command(), replay_script(), and
write_replay_script() for post-mortem reproduction. Extract
runner_prefix_for_command() and shell_escape()/shell_join() helpers.

fcp-e2e binary: refactored to use command_metadata(), captures per-step
stdout, generates E2eArtifactRecord entries for request/response/
stdout/stderr, writes replay.sh, captures exit status at teardown.

lib: re-export session script types, add session_transcript to
E2eRunReport with builder and human summary rendering.

logging: add with_session_transcript_entry() and
with_session_transcript_summary() with v2 promotion, step numbering,
and secret redaction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
